title: Zeebe Job Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for the Zeebe Job resource activated from service tasks

fields.name: jobKey
fields.description: Unique auto-generated key identifying this job

fields.name: type
fields.description: Job type string matching worker subscriptions (e.g., 'payment-service')

fields.name: processInstanceKey
fields.description: Key of the process instance that created this job

fields.name: bpmnProcessId
fields.description: BPMN process ID of the owning process

fields.name: elementId
fields.description: ID of the service task element in the BPMN that created this job

fields.name: elementInstanceKey
fields.description: Key of the specific service task instance

fields.name: customHeaders
fields.description: Key-value headers defined on the service task in BPMN

fields.name: worker
fields.description: Worker name that activated and locked this job

fields.name: retries
fields.description: Remaining retry count before an incident is raised

fields.name: deadline
fields.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the job lock expires and can be reactivated

fields.name: variables
fields.description: Subset of process variables fetched according to fetchVariable list
